messages.consecutive_low_sleep: Baby has had insufficient sleep for {days} consecutive days; please monitor closely.
messages.consecutive_long_intervals: Feeding intervals have been too long for {count} consecutive times; please monitor.
messages.consecutive_low_mood: Low mood detected for {days} consecutive days; please pay attention to mental health.
messages.high_feeding_frequency: Feeding frequency is high, average interval {hours} hours.
messages.low_feeding_frequency: Feeding frequency is low, average interval {hours} hours; please monitor.
messages.weight_loss: Weight decreased by {percent}%; please monitor recovery.
messages.breast_condition: Breast condition changes are frequent; consider consulting a doctor or lactation consultant.

consecutive_low_mood: Reach out to your support network
